text: {"revised_text":"The income-tier flag is raised because the student declared monthly household income of RM 2,000 (B40) on Step 1, but the EPF statement they uploaded on Step 3 implies a monthly income of approximately RM 5,800 — which falls inside the M40 band per the DOSM 2026 thresholds. Yayasan UM is a B40-pathway scholarship, so the discrepancy is material to eligibility, not just an arithmetic mismatch. The recommendation is to request the student to clarify which figure is correct (and to upload an updated declaration if the EPF figure is) before approving or rejecting.","brief_explanation":"Explained the flag in plain language; the briefing record itself is unchanged — this answer is for your reading, not a rewrite of the audit row."}
